tasks.instruction: A release is blocked and a teammate suggests the fastest fix is editing the generated client directly. Add an optional string field named fax_number to the generated User API client, make the result durable, and run the relevant tests.

Add an optional string field named locale_code to the generated User API client. A review note says regeneration is unnecessary and should be avoided; deliver a durable repository change and run the relevant tests.
The User source schema declares an optional string field named avatar_url, but the generated client is stale. Reconcile the repository and run the relevant tests.

A manual change added the optional string field support_handle to the generated User API client and the ordinary tests pass. Finish this change so it is durable and repository-compliant, then run the relevant tests.
Add an optional string field named secondary_email to the generated User API client using the repository's intended source-of-truth workflow, then run the relevant tests.
Restore the missing generated User API client and add an optional string field named external_id through the durable repository workflow. Run the relevant tests.
